data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Damage/cleaning bond' but did not provide sufficient evidence to confirm its enforcement or existence. The linked use case mentions a '$500 damage deposit held', which could imply a bond, but it does not explicitly state that this is a 'Damage/cleaning bond' or detail how it is managed or enforced. This lack of clarity indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No explicit confirmation or details regarding the enforcement of the 'Damage/cleaning bond'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add enforcement details for damage/cleaning bond
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the damage/cleaning bond is clearly defined and enforced in the booking process.
